examples: She set up a literacy program

meanings.definition: create by putting components or members together
get ready for a particular purpose or event
examples: lay out the tools for the surgery

meanings.definition: put into a proper or systematic order
examples: arrange the books on the shelves in chronological order

meanings.definition: begin, or enable someone else to begin, a venture by providing the means, logistics, etc.
take or catch as if in a snare or trap
examples: The innocent man was framed by the police
The scientists set up a shock wave
We put in a new sink
Her manager had set her up at the Ritz

meanings.definition: arrange the outcome of by means of deceit

examples: I put these memories with those of bygone times

meanings.definition: make ready or suitable or equip in advance for a particular purpose or for some use, event, etc
examples: Get the children ready for school!
I was fixing to leave town after I paid the hotel bill
